scripts.aws_docker_login: aws ecr-public get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin public.ecr.aws
scripts.deploy:local:bootstrap: DEPLOYMENT=localstack ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 CDK_DEFAULT_ACCOUNT=000000000000 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=000000000000 AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=000000000000 cdklocal bootstrap
scripts.deploy:local: DEPLOYMENT=localstack ORIGIN=http://localhost:3000 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 CDK_DEFAULT_ACCOUNT=000000000000 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=000000000000 AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=000000000000 cdklocal deploy --outputs-file outputs.json ordinals && node ./scripts/generateTableNamesEnv.mjs
